web_results.title: r/changemyview on Reddit: CMV: James Talarico would be the perfect Democratic candidate for President in 2028.
web_results.description: She's also great at getting through to people, and i believe that she would be extremely appealing to working class voters and Latinos...the 2 drivers of the democratic base. A young, charismatic, candidate of change. I think AOC has 2028 nominee written all over her. ... LOL AOC is not winning shit....that would be a freaking disaster to have AOC as the main candidate, just an easy ass landslide victory for the Repubs because she's definitely not winning freaking WI, MI and PA. Talarico so far, has the better reach and has shown he can win in a Trump district.

web_results.title: James Talarico - Wikipedia
web_results.description: In July 2025, Talarico appeared on The Joe Rogan Experience and discussed the influence of faith on his political career, after which Rogan recommended he run for president in 2028.

news_results.title: Democrats want a fight. In Texas, they're divided over how — and whom — to fight next.
news_results.description: Rep. Jasmine Crockett launched her Senate campaign by highlighting her clashes with Trump, while state Rep. James Talarico has taken aim at a “broken, corrupt political system.”

news_results.title: Republicans are freaking out over Texas Senate race - POLITICO
news_results.description: Texas Attorney General Ken Paxton is the man to beat ahead of Tuesday’s primary — and could put Senate Republicans’ majority at risk

news_results.title: James Talarico says he's still the underdog in Democratic primary for Texas Senate against Jasmine Crockett - CBS Texas
news_results.description: After a Colbert interview that went viral and big spending on ads, Rep. James Talarico says he's still the underdog in the Democratic primary for Texas Senate against Jasmine Crockett.

news_results.title: Jasmine Crockett's chances of beating James Talarico in Texas primary—Poll - Newsweek
news_results.description: A new poll showed how voters are feeling about Crockett and Talarico ahead of next week's primary election.

news_results.title: Jasmine Crockett leads James Talarico by double digits in Senate Democratic primary, poll finds – Houston Public Media
news_results.description: On the Republican side, Ken Paxton and John Cornyn were neck-and-neck and in position for a runoff, according to the poll from the University of Texas’ Texas Politics Project.
